title: sorghum brachystachyum
intro: Sorghum brachystachyum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of plant in the Sorghum genus that is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of sorghum brachystachyum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of sorghum brachystachyum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
